Localization.Description: A change in the LDAP attributes msPKIAccountCredentials and msPKIRoamingTimestamp is detected. This indicates an exploitation of a Windows Credential Roaming vulnerability, which allows writing to any file on behalf of the victim user.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed the LDAP attribute {object.property} of user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. This indicates a possible attempt to add malicious code to one of the files on behalf of {object.account.name} on his next login.
